rationale: Both reviews correctly identify all three material issues (bundled class, wrong-type/vacuous IsUnipotent, True-stub classes) with fixes that converge on the same outcome: remove the stubs, remove IsUnipotent, and unbundle AffineAlgGroup. Review 1 names the GroupLike-vs-points-functor distinction as an extra finding, but both reviews direct the author to delete IsUnipotent, so that extra insight changes nothing about the resulting PR.
